colony_locations.description: Battlefield locations within the infested colony

locations.name: Residential Block

tactical_considerations.movement: Moderate - streets allow fast movement, buildings slow

bug_advantages: Hunter Bugs excel in urban terrain
special_rules: Buildings can be entered (requires 1 action)
Infested buildings may contain bugs (roll 1D6 on entry, 4+ spawns 1D3 Worker Bugs)
Rooftops provide +2 to hit for snipers

infestation_effects.level_1-2: Some buildings infested, bio-matter in corners
infestation_effects.level_3-4: Half of buildings structurally unsound, organic growths common
infestation_effects.level_5: Buildings collapsing, entire block is hive structure

locations.name: Industrial Complex

tactical_considerations.sightlines: Mixed - open factory floor, but machinery blocks
tactical_considerations.movement: Varied - open areas but machinery creates obstacles

bug_advantages: Large spaces favor Heavy Bugs and charging
Vertical elements (conveyor systems) suit Flying Bugs
soldier_advantages: Sentry Guns effective in open factory floor
special_rules: Storage tanks: If hit by fire, roll 1D6. On 5-6, explodes (3D6 damage in 6" radius)
Machinery: Can be activated to create moving obstacles
Conveyor Systems: Provide elevated firing positions (+1 to hit)
Chemical Leaks: 1D3 acid pool hazards present

infestation_effects.level_3-4: Machinery failing, dangerous chemical interactions with bio-matter
infestation_effects.level_5: Total industrial collapse, explosive hazards everywhere

locations.name: Agricultural Dome

tactical_considerations.cover_availability: Low-Medium - fields provide concealment not cover
tactical_considerations.sightlines: Excellent - open fields, long firing lanes
tactical_considerations.movement: Fast in open, slow through crops

bug_advantages: Bio-matter spreads rapidly in fertile soil
soldier_advantages: Good fields of fire for defensive positions
Hydroponic towers provide strong firing positions
special_rules: Crop Fields: Provide concealment (-1 to hit) but not cover
Irrigation Channels: Count as difficult terrain, -2" movement to cross
Greenhouses: Transparent - can see and shoot through (glass) but provide cover
Hydroponic Towers: Can be climbed for elevated positions (requires 2 actions)

infestation_effects.level_3-4: Crops completely replaced by bio-matter, toxic spore clouds common
infestation_effects.level_5: Entire dome is bug breeding ground, constant spore hazard

locations.name: Underground Service Tunnels
bug_advantages: Can spawn from vents and side passages
Darkness (if power out) helps Hunter Bugs
special_rules: Close Quarters: All ranged weapons beyond 12" ineffective
Darkness: If no lights, visibility reduced to 6" (unless using night vision)
Ventilation Shafts: Bugs spawn from vents (roll each round)
Tunnel Collapse: Explosives risk collapse (1D6 damage to all in 12")
No Retreat: Limited space means no room to flee

infestation_effects.level_3-4: Heavy bio-matter, organic growths narrow passages
infestation_effects.level_5: Tunnels completely transformed into hive corridors

locations.name: Spaceport Landing Field
bug_advantages: Open ground favors mass charges by Heavy Bugs
Flying Bugs have complete aerial freedom
Little cover for soldiers means exposure
soldier_advantages: Perfect fields of fire for heavy weapons
Spacecraft can be used as fortified positions
special_rules: Fuel Depot: If ignited, massive explosion (4D6 damage in 12" radius)
Control Tower: 4 levels, provides excellent overwatch position
Spacecraft: Can be boarded and sealed (creates safe room)
Landing Pads: Extraction point for evacuation missions
Open Exposure: No natural cover on tarmac, must use vehicles/containers

infestation_effects.level_1-2: Some bugs on periphery, landing field mostly clear
infestation_effects.level_3-4: Bio-matter creeping across tarmac, some spacecraft infested
infestation_effects.level_5: Entire spaceport overrun, spacecraft destroyed or cocooned

locations.name: Medical Facility
soldier_advantages: Medical supplies available (Med Kits can be scavenged)
special_rules: Medical Supplies: Can be looted (roll 1D6, 4+ finds Med Kit)
Infested Patients: Roll when entering occupied rooms (1D3 Infested Humans)
Quarantine: Special rules - sealed rooms require breaching
Operating Rooms: Hard cover from equipment, can perform medical actions (+1 to healing)

infestation_effects.level_1-2: Some patients infested, quarantine in effect
infestation_effects.level_3-4: Facility abandoned, heavy infestation in quarantine wing
infestation_effects.level_5: Entire hospital is parasite breeding ground

locations.name: Administrative Center
terrain_features: Plaza with monument (open area with centerpiece)

tactical_considerations.sightlines: Plaza offers long lanes, buildings block
tactical_considerations.movement: Open in plaza, confined in buildings

soldier_advantages: Data center contains intel on infestation
special_rules: Data Access: Can retrieve colony intel (provides tactical bonuses next mission)
Security Systems: May still function (automated doors, cameras reveal bug positions)
Multiple Floors: Each floor must be cleared separately
Monument: Provides +1 morale if held (symbolic importance)

infestation_effects.level_1-2: Some offices infested, data mostly intact
infestation_effects.level_5: Government center is hive nerve center, Queen may be present

locations.name: Mining Operation

tactical_considerations.sightlines: Variable - equipment blocks, pit offers elevation

soldier_advantages: Pit edges offer elevated firing positions
special_rules: Mine Entrance: Bugs spawn from depths (unlimited reinforcements if not sealed)
Excavated Pit: -2" movement to climb, provides elevation bonus
Mining Explosives: Can be found and used (acts as Breach Charges)
Ore Piles: Difficult terrain, provide cover

infestation_effects.level_1-2: Surface infestation, mine tunnels becoming nests
infestation_effects.level_3-4: Deep tunnels fully infested, constant bug emergence
infestation_effects.level_5: Entire mining complex is massive underground hive

locations.name: Hive Chamber
bug_advantages: Home territory - bugs gain +1 to all actions
soldier_advantages: Flamethrowers extremely effective against organic matter
special_rules: Organic Environment: All soldiers at -1 to morale checks
Living Walls: Walls may attack (tentacles), deal 1 damage if soldier adjacent
Breeding Chambers: Primary objectives, destructible (Armor 5, 10 HP)
Spawn Vents: Roll 1D6 each round, bugs emerge on 4+
Bio-luminescence: No darkness, everything visible
Toxic Air: Soldiers without sealed armor take 1 damage/round
Queen's Presence: If Queen in chamber, all bugs gain command bonuses

infestation_effects.description: Hive chamber is always maximum infestation
infestation_effects.permanent_effects: Environmental damage, spawn points, organic hazards all active

locations.name: Research Laboratory
bug_advantages: Parasites may be present in containment
special_rules: Containment Breach: Roll 1D6 when combat starts. On 5-6, containment fails (bugs escape)
Chemical Storage: Explosive if ignited (2D6 damage, 4" radius)
Research Data: Can be recovered for intel bonus
Specimen Tanks: May contain parasites (Infested Human encounters)
Clean Room: Sealed environment, bugs cannot enter without breaching

infestation_effects.level_5: Lab repurposed by bugs as breeding facility

terrain_generation.description: Rules for generating terrain for Bug Hunt missions

standard_setup.cover_ratio: 60% hard cover, 40% soft cover or difficult terrain
standard_setup.sightline_blocking: At least 3-4 large pieces that block line of sight completely

mission_specific_modifications.EXTERMINATION: More open terrain to encourage combat, fewer hiding spots
mission_specific_modifications.DEFENSE: Pre-built defensive positions, fortifications, clear firing lanes
mission_specific_modifications.ASSAULT: Hive interior terrain, organic structures, spawn vents
mission_specific_modifications.STEALTH: More cover and concealment, shadows and hiding spots
mission_specific_modifications.RESCUE: Buildings and structures with interior rooms
mission_specific_modifications.INTEL: Mixed terrain with patrol routes and observation points

infestation_terrain_effects.level_0-1: Normal colony terrain, minimal bug modification
infestation_terrain_effects.level_2-3: Bio-matter patches appear (1D6 patches, 3" diameter each)
infestation_terrain_effects.level_4: Heavy bio-matter (40% of board), organic growths, acid pools
infestation_terrain_effects.level_5: Entire battlefield transformed, organic terrain dominates

environmental_conditions.description: Weather and atmospheric conditions affecting battles

conditions.name: Heavy Rain
conditions.effects: Visibility reduced to 18", +1 to stealth checks, -1 to hit beyond 12"
conditions.tactical_impact: Favors close combat, reduces ranged effectiveness
conditions.special: Washes away some bio-matter, no acid pool growth

conditions.name: Dense Fog
conditions.effects: Visibility reduced to 12", Motion Tracker range -4", +2 to stealth
conditions.tactical_impact: Extreme close combat, Motion Tracker less reliable

conditions.name: Electrical Storm
conditions.effects: Motion Trackers 50% chance to malfunction each use, -1 to hit with energy weapons
conditions.special: Lightning may strike (roll 1D6 each round, on 1 random model hit for 2D6)

conditions.name: Acid Rain
conditions.effects: All models in open take 1 damage each round, armor degrades (-1 save per round exposed)

conditions.name: Toxic Atmosphere
conditions.effects: Unsealed soldiers take 1 damage/round, -1 to all actions
conditions.tactical_impact: Requires sealed armor (Combat Armor) to operate safely

tactical_terrain_features.description: Specific terrain elements and their rules

features.name: Hard Cover
features.defensive_bonus: +2 to armor save against ranged attacks
features.usage: Model must be touching or within 1" to benefit

features.name: Soft Cover
features.defensive_bonus: +1 to armor save against ranged attacks
features.visibility: Blocks line of sight for 50% of model
features.usage: Model must be touching or within 1" to benefit
features.destructible: Can be destroyed by sustained fire or explosives

features.name: Difficult Terrain
features.special: Bugs may ignore certain difficult terrain types (bio-matter)

features.name: Elevated Position
features.offensive_bonus: +1 to hit when shooting from elevation
features.access: Requires climbing (1-2 actions depending on height)

features.name: Chokepoint
features.defensive_bonus: Defender gets +1 to combat if holding chokepoint
features.special: Only 1 model can pass through per activation

features.name: Explosive Terrain
features.examples: Fuel tanks, chemical storage, gas cylinders
features.danger: If hit, roll 1D6. On 5-6, explodes (damage varies by type)

features.name: Bio-luminescent Area
features.tactical_impact: No stealth bonuses in lit areas
features.special: Bugs gain +1" speed in bio-luminescent areas (comfortable environment)

features.name: Ventilation Shaft
features.special_rule: Bug spawn point - roll each round to check for spawns
features.sealing: Requires explosives or welding (2 actions + equipment)

location_selection.description: How to choose battlefield location for missions

methods.description: GM selects location based on mission type and story
methods.example: RESCUE mission → Residential Block or Medical Facility

table.10: Hive Chamber (if infestation 3+) or roll again

methods.description: Select location that fits mission objectives

multi-zone_battles.description: Large missions spanning multiple connected areas
multi-zone_battles.setup: Use 2-3 location types connected by transition zones
multi-zone_battles.example: Start in Residential Block, advance through Underground Tunnels, assault Hive Chamber

rules.zone_transition: Requires moving to edge of board, triggers next zone setup
rules.reinforcements: Bugs may spawn in rear zones (preventing retreat)
rules.extraction: Final zone must lead to extraction point

multi-zone_battles.tactical_impact: Epic multi-phase battles, tests squad endurance and ammunition
